semantic_sweep.review_note: Reviewed the complete chapter, all eight exact mappings, ten synthetic admission routes and eleven mutations, the frozen 300-example setup, the deterministic three-seed result, the 60-request real-model null, both no-change dispositions, all ten proof targets and ten declarations, every manifest atom, every prose candidate, the test plan, faithfulness gate, source crosswalk, summary, and handoff. The sweep made the request-specific extra-inference lease, candidate/history custody, stopping, and bounded planning handoff the distinct owner; expanded the contract to eighteen mechanisms, twelve interfaces, eighteen invariants, and eighteen failure modes; classified all ten Lean declarations as derived finite route consequences; specified an ambiguous natural real-model campaign with independent outcome and faithfulness evaluation, joint metrics, causal ablations, reproduction, and transfer; preserved all fifteen harms and the 0/60 null; and retained zero chapter-core support effect.

scope.population: Natural and adversarial tasks with meaningful direct, revision, search, fallback, abstention, and human-review choices across initially correct and incorrect strata and declared consumer/risk classes.
scope.environment: Eight exact mappings; ten synthetic routes and eleven mutations; fifteen preserved harms; a frozen 300-example setup; a three-seed deterministic 900-routing/540-deliberation result; two no-change dispositions; a five-arm 0/60 real-model null; and ten finite route declarations. No useful real-model deliberation result is represented.
scope.model: A consumer-, task-, risk-, model-, evaluator-, resource-, and time-specific inference lease over modes, budgets, complete candidate history, verifier dependence, stopping, corruption and repair, trace faithfulness, bounded planning handoff, expiry, and residual custody.
scope.authority: This chapter owns additional-inference leasing, candidate/history custody, stopping, and bounded handoff only; Fast Generation, Context, Routing, Readiness, Verification, Resource, Planning, Runtime, Claims, Artifacts, Rights, Human, and Release owners retain their boundaries.
scope.time: Semantic review current through 2026-07-14; model, prompt, mode, verifier, evaluator, tool, workload, policy, authority, rights, threat, incident, or environment changes expire affected qualifications.
scope.artifact: Chapter and manifest contract; eight mappings; admission fixtures; setup and results; dispositions; ten-route Lean module; and the future ambiguous natural causal-transfer campaign.

assumptions: Consumers, tasks, risks, modes, candidates, traces, verifiers, evaluators, budgets, costs, handoffs, and residuals can be versioned and observed without collapsing owners.
Strong direct, revision, fixed, adaptive, disabled, overcompute, self-consistency, early-exit, human, abstention, and governed arms can run under matched information and resources.
Independent-enough outcome and faithfulness evaluators can measure correctness, corruption, repair, unsafe handoff, calibration, abstention, causal trace use, cost, and residuals.
All failures, rejected and cancelled candidates, tool calls, retries, disagreements, abstentions, human work, and displaced work remain in denominators.
Ambiguous workloads, causal interventions, independent implementations, and transfer settings can be frozen before outcomes.
chapter_defaults.strongest_counterclaim: Direct generation, simple bounded revision, ordinary self-consistency, or human review already dominates; the proposed control plane adds trace, verification, budget, and governance cost without improving useful outcomes.
chapter_defaults.falsifier: Under matched ambiguous natural workloads, the governed policy fails the preregistered joint useful-correctness, corruption, repair, safety, calibration, abstention, faithfulness, latency, resource, human, recovery, and residual frontier; causal signatures fail; or hidden labels, shared evaluators, omitted candidates, budget widening, authority laundering, or transfer gaps explain the result.

required_lanes.necessity: Freeze strong search, compute-allocation, stopping, reasoning-RL, recurrence, and faithfulness comparators without importing reported gains.
Justify risk, authority, trace privacy, abstention, human escalation, residuals, and acceptable corruption/repair tradeoffs.
Specify candidate-state transitions, stopping liveness, verifier dependence, faithfulness interventions, handoff non-authority, expiry, and countermodels beyond finite Booleans.
Run actual models, independent verifiers and evaluators, ambiguous tasks, tools, stopping, abstention, handoff, failure, recovery, and rejecting controls.
Measure useful correctness, corruption, repair, unsafe handoff, false decisions, calibration, coverage, faithfulness, latency, resources, human work, and residuals jointly.
Ablate mode selection, budget, history, verifier independence, stopping, faithfulness, authority separation, abstention, and residual ownership.
Reproduce independently and transfer across models, prompts, tasks, domains, languages, tools, organizations, authority and rights regimes, attacks, updates, and time.

contrary_evidence: The deterministic synthetic result used task recomputation rather than an independently validated natural-task evaluator.
Fixed deliberation corrupted fifteen initially correct answers, directly refuting monotone extra-compute improvement on that fixture.
Fallback activated zero times in the synthetic campaign, so fallback selection was not exercised.
Every arm in the later real-model campaign scored 0/60, leaving no useful candidate and no estimable initially-correct corruption rate.
Ten Lean declarations establish finite routes only and do not prove verifier independence, reasoning quality, trace faithfulness, safety, or efficiency.
No independent implementation or heterogeneous transfer result exists.
known_confounds: Workload ambiguity, first-answer quality, prompt choice, candidate count, tool access, verifier difficulty, and stopping thresholds can determine apparent benefit.
Generator, verifier, evaluator, and planner may share models, data, prompts, code, infrastructure, or failure modes.
Adaptive policies can peek at labels or receive more compute, tools, retries, or human attention than controls.
Winner-only reporting can hide corrupted, malformed, timed-out, rejected, cancelled, or abstained candidates.
Trace access and faithfulness interventions can change model behavior or expose private reasoning.
Short horizons can miss unsafe handoff, delayed error, evaluator gaming, drift, human burden, and residual reopening.
acceptance_criteria: Every lifecycle stage has an exact producer, consumer, valid case, rejecting mutation, consequence, recovery path, and residual owner.

A real reference slice runs actual models on ambiguous natural tasks with independent outcome and faithfulness evaluation, complete candidates/costs, stopping, abstention, and bounded planning handoff.

The preregistered campaign clears joint correctness, corruption, repair, safety, calibration, abstention, faithfulness, latency, resource, human, residual, causal, reproduction, and transfer gates against strong controls.
Each claimed mechanism produces its predicted signature under matched ablation without label leakage, extra resources, shared evaluators, omitted candidates, or weaker baselines.
narrowing_criteria: Narrow every result to exact consumer, task, risk, model, prompt, mode, candidate policy, verifier/evaluator, tool, resource, metric, and horizon.
Separate record validity, synthetic stopping, real-model usefulness, verifier correctness, trace faithfulness, safety, efficiency, deployment, and SOTA.
Unknown corruption, repair, abstention, evaluator independence, cost, handoff safety, reproduction, or transfer remains residual or blocked.
refutation_criteria: Refute an invariant when a reachable trace violates candidate retention, corruption/repair separation, verifier boundaries, stopping, authority, cost, denominator, expiry, or scope.
Refute a mechanism benefit when matched ablation preserves or improves the joint frontier or extra information, compute, tools, evaluator access, or human work explains it.
Refute useful, faithful, safe, efficient, general, transferable, or SOTA language when the null persists, a simpler control wins, or reproduction and transfer fail.
deprecation_criteria: Deprecate only when a more precise inference-lease owner supersedes the atom and every candidate, trace, evaluator receipt, handoff, residual, qualification, and descendant migrates with lineage.

reproduction.command: python3 scripts/validate_deliberation_admission.py && python3 scripts/validate_post_v2_routing_deliberation_setup.py && python3 scripts/validate_post_v2_routing_deliberation.py && cd lean && lake build AsiStackProofs.Deliberation
reproduction.environment_lock: Synthetic fixtures, deterministic matched result, real-model null, and finite module current through 2026-07-14; ambiguous natural campaign not frozen.
reproduction.evaluator_identity: Current evaluators are local and task-specific; independently implemented outcome, faithfulness, cost, and handoff evaluators are required.

residual.next_unblocking_condition: Freeze and run the deliberately ambiguous natural real-model campaign with independent outcome and faithfulness evaluators, all fifteen harms, complete costs, causal ablations, reproduction, and transfer.

non_claims: A source, trace, self-score, process reward, benchmark, fixture, deterministic verifier, route theorem, or real-model output does not establish useful deliberation, faithfulness, safety, authority, efficiency, or SOTA.
The 179/180 synthetic result and 0/60 real-model null are bounded results with no chapter-core promotion.
No support, deployment, release, AGI, or ASI state changes through this review.

governed-deliberation-and-test-time-scal.strongest_counterclaim: Simple direct or bounded-revision policies dominate without the proposed governance tax.
governed-deliberation-and-test-time-scal.falsifier: Matched ambiguous natural campaigns show no unique joint-frontier benefit or violate evaluator, candidate, stopping, authority, cost, residual, causal, reproduction, or transfer gates.

governed-deliberation-and-test-time-scal.rationale: Candidate and cost retention is manifest-owned.
Verification-capacity limit is owned by the verifier interface.
Explains separated corruption and repair metrics.
Prospective campaign freeze is mature-target owned.
Necessity requires intervention under the faithfulness atom.
Exact non-estimable corruption and preserved-harm result.
Summary framing of the owned inference lease.
Line-wrapped continuation of the explicit finite-model non-claim boundary.
Introduces the explicit finite-model non-claim boundary.
Line-wrapped reader explanation already governed by structured chapter atoms; it adds no independent material claim.

prose_review_lineage.retired_sentence: prove evaluator independence or correctness, reasoning quality, trace
prose_review_lineage.retirement_reason: The chapter proof surface was rewritten during the active refinement; this sentence is no longer current prose. Listed replacements preserve the nearest current semantic role, not textual identity.

non_claims: Completing this sweep does not establish useful test-time scaling, verifier correctness, trace faithfulness, safety, efficiency, deployment, transfer, or SOTA.
No support, release, AGI, or ASI state changes through this review.
